```lean
theorem list_insertIdx_length {l1 l2 : List α} {idx : Nat} {hidx : idx <= l1.length}
    {l1 : List α} {elt : α} :
    (l1 ++ l2).insertIdx idx elt = (l1.insertIdx idx elt) ++ l2
    := by
  induction l1 generalizing idx hidx with
  | nil =>
    -- from the fact idx <= l1.length = [].length
    have : idx = 0 := by
      simp at hidx
      <;> omega
    subst idx
    simp
  | cons hd tl HR =>
    simp only [List.insertIdx_cons, List.cons_append] at *
    <;>
    (try cases idx <;> simp_all [Nat.succ_eq_add_one, List.insertIdx, List.cons_append])
    <;>
    (try simp_all [List.tail_cons, List.length_cons, List.insertIdx])
    <;>
    (try omega)
    <;>
    (try {
      cases idx with
      | zero => simp_all [List.insertIdx]
      | succ idx =>
        simp_all [List.insertIdx]
        <;>
        (try omega)
        <;>
        (try ring_nf at *)
        <;>
        (try simp_all [Nat.succ_eq_add_one, List.insertIdx])
    })
    <;>
    (try {
      simp_all [List.cons_append, List.insertIdx]
      <;>
      (try omega)
      <;>
      (try ring_nf at *)
      <;>
      (try simp_all [Nat.succ_eq_add_one, List.insertIdx])
    })
    <;>
    (try {
      simp_all [List.cons_append, List.insertIdx]
      <;>
      (try omega)
      <;>
      (try ring_nf at *)
      <;>
      (try simp_all [Nat.succ_eq_add_one, List.insertIdx])
      <;>
      (try {
        have h₁ := HR (idx) (by omega)
        simp_all [List.cons_append, List.insertIdx]
        <;>
        (try omega)
        <;>
        (try ring_nf at *)
        <;>
        (try simp_all [Nat.succ_eq_add_one, List.insertIdx])
      })
    })
